name: california-el-dorado
description: El Dorado County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: El Dorado County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past El Dorado County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('El Dorado County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: El Dorado County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract El Dorado County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-el-dorado-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-el-dorado-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page uses a standard ASP.NET layout with a main content area likely inside a div with id 'main-content' or similar, though the provided snippet is truncated.
Representative data is likely contained within a repeating HTML structure (e.g., <div class='rep-item'> or <li>) within the main content container.
Photo URLs are likely found in tags with 'src' attributes that may be relative paths requiring absolutization.
Detail URLs are typically found in <a> tags with 'href' attributes pointing to individual representative profiles.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for El Dorado County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: El Dorado County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for El Dorado County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: El Dorado County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — El Dorado recently transitioned filing software; confirm NetFile or local system.
